query:
-- إضافة Foreign Keys لجدول groups
ALTER TABLE `groups` 
ADD CONSTRAINT `fk_groups_cost_center` 
FOREIGN KEY (`cost_center_id`) REFERENCES `cost_centers`(`id`) 
ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE;

ALTER TABLE `groups` 
ADD CONSTRAINT `fk_groups_supervisor` 
FOREIGN KEY (`supervisor_id`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) 
ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE;
